---
title: "How It Runs"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
**The mechanics of running this project end to end.** A reader who wants to
reproduce or extend the work should be able to follow this section and know
which scripts, configs, and steps to invoke in what order.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - What are the steps, in order, from raw inputs to final outputs?
  - Which scripts, modules, or commands drive each step?
  - What's the entry point — the one command that runs the whole thing?
  - Are there branches in the pipeline (e.g. training vs inference, batch vs
    on-demand) a reader should know about?
-->
